zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Colepepper於1299年出生在英國素可阿爾丁格利時，她的父親Richard Colepeper II29歲，母親Joan Naylor27歲。她和Henry de Bereham IV至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1356年在英國素可巴爾可姆享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Colepepper于1299年出生在英国素可阿爾丁格利时，她的父亲Richard Colepeper II29岁，母亲Joan Naylor27岁。她和Henry de Bereham IV至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1356年在英国素可巴爾可姆享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Colepepper was born in 1299, in Ardingly, Sussex, England, her father, Richard Colepeper II, was 29 and her mother, Joan Naylor, was 27. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Henry de Bereham IV. She died about 1356, in Balcombe, Sussex, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Colepepper est née en 1299, à Ardingly, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Colepeper II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Naylor, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Henry de Bereham IV. Elle est décédée environ 1356, à Balcombe, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Colepepper 1299 in Ardingly, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Colepeper II 29 und ihre Mutter Joan Naylor 27. Sie hatte mit Henry de Bereham IV mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1356 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Balcombe, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Colepepper è nata il nel 1299 nel Ardingly, Sussex, England, sua padre, Richard Colepeper II, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Joan Naylor, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Henry de Bereham IV. Morì circa 1356, nel Balcombe, Sussex, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Colepepperが1299年にイギリススセックスアルディングリーで生まれた時，父Richard Colepeper IIは29歳，母Joan Naylorは27歳であった。彼女はHenry de Bereham IVとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1356年にイギリススセックスボーコンベで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Colepepper(이)가 1299년 영국 수세스 아딩리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Colepeper II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Naylor(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Henry de Bereham IV(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1356년 영국 수세스 바코브에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Colepepper nasceu em 1299, em Ardingly, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Colepeper II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan Naylor, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Henry de Bereham IV. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1356, em Balcombe, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Colepepper родилась в 1299 г. в местности ардингли, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Colepeper II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Naylor, 27. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Henry de Bereham IV. Она умерла около 1356 г. в местности балкомб, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Colepepper nació en 1299, en Ardingly, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Colepeper II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan Naylor, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Henry de Bereham IV. Murió aproximadamente 1356, en Balcombe, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
